name: Spicy Texas BBQ Sauce
recipeIngredient: 2 Jalapeno peppers, seeded and finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 2-quart pan, heat all ingredients over high heat until boiling.
2. Reduce the heat to low and cover the pan.
3. Simmer for a few minutes to combine flavors.
Makes approximately 5 cups of sauce.
